version: '3.8'

services:
  sql-server-db:
    image: mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/server:2022-latest
    container_name: sql-server-db
    environment:
      - ACCEPT_EULA=Y
      - SA_PASSWORD=TechMove@123
      - MSSQL_PID=Express
    ports:
      - "1433:1433"
    networks:
      - techmove-network

  glms-backend-api:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: TechMove.API/Dockerfile
    container_name: glms-backend-api
    environment:
      - ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development
      - ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://+:8080
      - ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection=Server=sql-server-db;Database=TechMoveDb;User Id=sa;Password=TechMove@123;TrustServerCertificate=True;
    ports:
      - "5000:8080"
    depends_on:
      - sql-server-db
    networks:
      - techmove-network

  glms-frontend-web:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: TechMove.Web/Dockerfile
    container_name: glms-frontend-web
    environment:
      - ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development
      - ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://+:8080
      - ApiSettings__BaseUrl=http://glms-backend-api:8080/
    ports:
      - "7000:8080"
    depends_on:
      - glms-backend-api
    networks:
      - techmove-network

networks:
  techmove-network:
    driver: bridge
